# ChinAPIs

[![License:
MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/license-MIT-blue.svg)](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/LICENSE)
[![CRAN
status](https://www.r-pkg.org/badges/version/ChinAPIs)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=ChinAPIs)
[![CRAN
downloads](https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/ChinAPIs)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=ChinAPIs)
[![CRAN total
downloads](https://cranlogs.r-pkg.org/badges/grand-total/ChinAPIs)](https://cran.r-project.org/package=ChinAPIs)

The `ChinAPIs` package provides a unified interface to access open data
from the **World Bank API** and **Nager.Date API**, with a focus on
**China**. It allows users to retrieve up-to-date information on topics
such as economic indicators, population statistics, unemployment rates,
and holidays.

In addition to API-access functions, the package includes one of the
largest curated collections of open datasets related to **China** and
**Hong Kong**. These datasets cover areas such as air quality,
demographic indicators, input-output economic tables, epidemiology,
administrative divisions, name distributions, political structure, and
various social indicators.

## Installation

You can install the `ChinAPIs` package from CRAN with the following R
function:

``` r


install.packages("ChinAPIs")
```

## Usage

After installation, load the package and start exploring and using its
functions and datasets.

``` r


library(ChinAPIs)
```

### ChinAPIs Functions

Below is a list of the main functions included in the package:

- [`get_china_gdp()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_gdp.md):
  Get China’s Gross Domestic Product (current US\$) from the World Bank

- [`get_china_cpi()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_cpi.md):
  Get China’s Consumer Price Index from World Bank

- [`get_china_population()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_population.md):
  Get China’s total population from the World Bank

- [`get_china_literacy_rate()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_literacy_rate.md):
  Get China’s adult literacy rate (Age 15+) from the World Bank

- [`get_china_life_expectancy()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_life_expectancy.md):
  Get life expectancy at birth for China from the World Bank

- [`get_china_unemployment()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_unemployment.md):
  Get China’s Unemployment Rate from World Bank

- [`get_china_energy_use()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_energy_use.md):
  Get China’s energy use per capita (kg of oil equivalent) from the
  World Bank

- [`get_china_child_mortality()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_child_mortality.md):
  Get under-5 mortality rate (per 1,000 live births) in China from the
  World Bank

- [`get_china_hospital_beds()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_hospital_beds.md):
  Get hospital beds per 1,000 people in China from the World Bank

- [`get_china_holidays()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_holidays.md):
  Retrieve Chinese public holidays (including past and upcoming dates)
  from the Nager.Date API (e.g., get_china_holidays(2024),
  get_china_holidays(2025)).

- [`view_datasets_ChinAPIs()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/view_datasets_ChinAPIs.md):
  Lists all curated datasets included in the ChinAPIs package

## Dataset Suffixes

Each dataset in `ChinAPIs` is labeled with a *suffix* to indicate its
structure and type:

- `_df`: A standard data frame.

- `_tbl_df`: A tibble data frame object.

- `_list`: A list object.

- `_matrix`: A matrix object.

## Datasets Included in ChinAPIs

In addition to API access functions, `ChinAPIs` provides several
preloaded datasets related to China’s air quality, demographics,
input-output tables, epidemiology, political structure, names, and
social indicators. Here are some featured examples:

- `bj_air_quality_tbl_df`: Tibble of hourly air pollution and weather
  measurements from Dongsi, Beijing.

- `china_admin_divisions_df`: Data frame containing the codes and names
  of China’s administrative divisions.

- `shanghai_factories_df`: Data frame containing data on per capita
  output of workers in 17 factories located in Shanghai.

## Example Code:

``` r


# Load the package

library(ChinAPIs)

# Get China's Population (Total) from World Bank

get_china_population()

# Load a dataset

data(china_cars_tbl_df)

# Shows six rows of the dataset

head(china_cars_tbl_df)

# Display the structure of the dataset

str(china_cars_tbl_df)

# Shows the whole dataset

View(china_cars_tbl_df)
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`bj_air_quality_tbl_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/bj_air_quality_tbl_df.md)
  : Beijing Air Quality Dataset (2015)
- [`ChinAPIs`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/ChinAPIs.md)
  [`ChinAPIs-package`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/ChinAPIs.md)
  : ChinAPIs: Access Chinese Data via APIs and Curated Datasets
- [`china_admin_divisions_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/china_admin_divisions_df.md)
  : Administrative Divisions of China
- [`china_cars_tbl_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/china_cars_tbl_df.md)
  : Stated Car Choice Data from Chinese Buyers
- [`china_corruption_tbl_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/china_corruption_tbl_df.md)
  : China's Corruption Investigations
- [`china_io_2002_122_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/china_io_2002_122_df.md)
  : Input-output Table for China, 2002 (122 Sectors)
- [`china_io_2005_42_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/china_io_2005_42_df.md)
  : Input-output Table for China, 2005 (42 Sectors)
- [`china_io_2007_135_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/china_io_2007_135_df.md)
  : Input-output Table for China, 2007 (135 Sectors)
- [`china_io_2010_41_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/china_io_2010_41_df.md)
  : Input-output Table for China, 2010 (41 Sectors)
- [`china_io_2012_139_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/china_io_2012_139_df.md)
  : Input-output Table for China, 2012 (139 Sectors)
- [`china_io_2015_42_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/china_io_2015_42_df.md)
  : Input-output Table for China, 2015 (42 Sectors)
- [`china_io_2017_149_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/china_io_2017_149_df.md)
  : Input-output Table for China, 2017 (149 Sectors)
- [`china_io_2017_42_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/china_io_2017_42_df.md)
  : China Input-Output Table (2017, 42 Sectors)
- [`china_io_2018_153_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/china_io_2018_153_df.md)
  : China Input-Output Table (2018, 153 Sectors)
- [`china_io_2018_42_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/china_io_2018_42_df.md)
  : China Input-Output Table (2018, 42 Sectors)
- [`china_io_2020_153_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/china_io_2020_153_df.md)
  : Input-output Table for China, 2020 (153 Sectors)
- [`china_io_2020_42_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/china_io_2020_42_df.md)
  : China Input-Output Table (2020, 42 Sectors)
- [`chinese_cities_tbl_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/chinese_cities_tbl_df.md)
  : List of Prominent Chinese Cities
- [`chinese_dams_tbl_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/chinese_dams_tbl_df.md)
  : Chinese Dams Dataset
- [`COVID19_HongKong_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/COVID19_HongKong_df.md)
  : COVID-19 Offspring Cases in Hong Kong (Jan–Apr 2020)
- [`family_name_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/family_name_df.md)
  : Chinese Surnames and National Frequency (1930–2008)
- [`get_china_child_mortality()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_child_mortality.md)
  : Get Under-5 Mortality Rate in China from World Bank
- [`get_china_cpi()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_cpi.md)
  : Get China's Consumer Price Index from World Bank
- [`get_china_energy_use()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_energy_use.md)
  : Get China's Energy Use (kg of oil equivalent per capita) from World
  Bank
- [`get_china_gdp()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_gdp.md)
  : Get China's GDP (Current US\$) from World Bank
- [`get_china_holidays()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_holidays.md)
  : Get Official Public Holidays in China for a Given Year
- [`get_china_hospital_beds()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_hospital_beds.md)
  : Get Hospital Beds per 1,000 People in China from World Bank
- [`get_china_life_expectancy()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_life_expectancy.md)
  : Get China's Life Expectancy at Birth from World Bank
- [`get_china_literacy_rate()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_literacy_rate.md)
  : Get China's Literacy Rate (Age 15+) from World Bank
- [`get_china_population()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_population.md)
  : Get China's Total Population from World Bank
- [`get_china_unemployment()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/get_china_unemployment.md)
  : Get China's Unemployment Rate from World Bank
- [`given_name_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/given_name_df.md)
  : Chinese Given Name Characters and Frequency (1930–2008)
- [`health_family_life_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/health_family_life_df.md)
  : Chinese Health and Family Life Survey
- [`hk_councillors_tbl_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/hk_councillors_tbl_df.md)
  : Hong Kong District Councillors Elected in 2019
- [`hk_districts_tbl_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/hk_districts_tbl_df.md)
  : Hong Kong District Labels and Regional Classification
- [`hk_population_tbl_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/hk_population_tbl_df.md)
  : Hong Kong Population by District and Age Group
- [`hk_street_names_tbl_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/hk_street_names_tbl_df.md)
  : Hong Kong Street Names as of 2020
- [`panda_locations_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/panda_locations_df.md)
  : Giant Panda Location Data
- [`population_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/population_df.md)
  : Population Statistics from the Chinese Name Database
- [`sars_hong_kong_list`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/sars_hong_kong_list.md)
  : Daily Incidence of the 2003 SARS Epidemic in Hong Kong
- [`shanghai_factories_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/shanghai_factories_df.md)
  : Per Capita Output of Workers in Shanghai Factories
- [`shanghai_pm25_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/shanghai_pm25_df.md)
  : PM2.5 Pollution and Weather Data in Shanghai
- [`top1000name_prov_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/top1000name_prov_df.md)
  : Top 1,000 Given Names by Province in Mainland China
- [`top100name_year_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/top100name_year_df.md)
  : Top 100 Given Names in 6 Birth Cohorts
- [`top50char_year_df`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/top50char_year_df.md)
  : Top 50 Given-Name Characters in 6 Birth Cohorts
- [`view_datasets_ChinAPIs()`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/view_datasets_ChinAPIs.md)
  : View Available Datasets in ChinAPIs
- [`wenchuan_ptsd_matrix`](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/reference/wenchuan_ptsd_matrix.md)
  : PTSD Symptoms of Wenchuan Earthquake Survivors

### All vignettes

  Datasets](https://lightbluetitan.github.io/chinapis/articles/ChinAPIs_vignette.md):
